Sure — here’s a clean table of planets.

| Planet | Nearest to Sun | Farthest from Sun | Moons | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Mercury | 46.0 M km | 69.8 M km | 0 | Terrestrial |
| Earth | 147.1 M km | 152.1 M km | 1 | Terrestrial |
| Jupiter | 740.5 M km | 816.6 M km | 95 | Gas Giant |
| Neptune | 4,444.5 M km | 4,545.7 M km | 16 | Ice Giant |

If you want I can convert this to AU as well.
